title: AeSlides: Incentivizing Aesthetic Layout in LLM-Based Slide Generation via Verifiable Rewards
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong potential in agentic tasks, particularly in slide generation. However, slide generation poses a fundamental challenge: the generation process is text-centric, whereas its quality is g...
